allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items = r if isinstance\(r,list\) else r.get\('data',[]\); print\('total:', len\(items\)\); print\('keys[0]:', list\(items[0].keys\(\)\) if items else 'empty'\); imgs=[i for i in items if i.get\('image_url'\)]; print\('with image:', len\(imgs\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items = r if isinstance\(r,list\) else r.get\('data',[]\); print\('total:', len\(items\)\); print\('keys:', list\(items[0].keys\(\)\) if items else 'empty'\); print\('has image_url:', 'image_url' in \(items[0] if items else {}\)\); imgs=[i for i in items if i.get\('image_url'\)]; print\('with image:', len\(imgs\)\)")
